items.title: Left atrial appendage closure with the AnchorMan or Watchman devices: 12-month results of the SAFE-PROTECT randomised trial
items.title_zh: AnchorMan 与 Watchman 左心耳封堵:SAFE-PROTECT 随机试验 12 个月结果
items.summary_zh: 中国多中心开放标签非劣效 RCT,216 例高卒中风险非瓣膜性房颤患者 1:1 随机接受新型 AnchorMan 或 Watchman 2.5 左心耳封堵。12 个月主要终点临床成功率两组均为 98.1%(非劣效 P=0.0004),超声 LAA 封堵率均达 100%;AnchorMan 的 >3 mm 器械周围残余漏发生率更低(5.7% vs 15.6%,P=0.04)。为 LAA 封堵器械领域再添一个经随机对照验证的新选择。
items.summary_en: SAFE-PROTECT, a Chinese multicentre open-label non-inferiority RCT, randomized 216 high-stroke-risk NVAF patients to the new AnchorMan vs Watchman 2.5 for LAA closure: 12-month clinical success 98.1% in both (non-inferiority P=0.0004), 100% echo closure, and fewer >3 mm peridevice leaks with AnchorMan (5.7% vs 15.6%, P=0.04).

items.title: Prosthesis-patient mismatch with intra-annular self-expanding valves: an analysis of the PORTICO IDE trial
items.title_zh: 环内自膨胀瓣膜的人工瓣膜-患者不匹配:PORTICO IDE 试验分析
items.summary_zh: PORTICO IDE 前瞻性随机试验 675 例高危/极高危重度主动脉瓣狭窄患者的核心实验室分析,比较 Portico、Evolut 与 SAPIEN 3 在小(≤23 mm)和大(>23 mm)瓣环中的血流动力学。小瓣环中环内自膨胀 Portico 显著优于球扩 SAPIEN 3(平均跨瓣压差 8.5 vs 13.7 mmHg,重度 PPM 3.3% vs 26.3%,均 P<0.0001),5 年结构性瓣膜退化率亦更低(2.2% vs 13.9%,P=0.03)。挑战'自膨胀 vs 球扩'的简单二分法。
items.summary_en: A core-lab analysis of the PORTICO IDE RCT (675 high/extreme-risk severe AS) comparing Portico, Evolut and SAPIEN 3 by annulus size: in small annuli the intra-annular self-expanding Portico beat balloon-expandable SAPIEN 3 (mean gradient 8.5 vs 13.7 mmHg, severe PPM 3.3% vs 26.3%, both P<0.0001) with lower 5-year deterioration (2.2% vs 13.9%) — challenging the self-expanding-vs-balloon dichotomy.

items.title: SAFER-TAVI: Radial Eases Secondary Access Site Problems
items.title_zh: SAFER-TAVI 试验:桡动脉作为 TAVI 次要入路减少入路并发症
items.summary_zh: 纽约瓣膜会 2026 公布、TCTMD 随后报道的 SAFER-TAVI 随机试验比较 TAVI 次要入路采用桡动脉与股动脉:桡动脉组入路并发症更少,但代价是辐射暴露增加、更常需转换入路(4.4% 对 1.1%)或增加第三入路。为 TAVI 次要入路选择提供随机证据。
items.summary_en: The SAFER-TAVI RCT (New York Valves 2026) compared radial vs femoral secondary access in TAVI: radial reduced access-site complications but at the cost of more radiation and more crossover/third-access (4.4% vs 1.1%) — randomized guidance for secondary-access choice.

items.title: Validation of the VARC-HBR consensus for defining high bleeding risk in TAVI
items.title_zh: VARC-HBR 共识定义 TAVI 高出血风险的验证研究
items.summary_zh: 由 CERC 联合 Capodanno、Mehran 等发表的研究通讯,在 TAVI 人群中对新近发布的 VARC-HBR 高出血风险定义进行验证。出血是 TAVI 术后重要的可干预并发症,该验证为围术期抗栓策略个体化与未来试验入选标准提供依据。
items.summary_en: A CERC-led research letter (with Capodanno and Mehran) validates the new VARC-HBR high-bleeding-risk definition in a TAVI population — supporting individualized antithrombotic strategy and future trial-enrollment criteria.

items.title: AnchorMan versus Watchman 2.5: a randomised comparison in left atrial appendage closure
items.title_zh: AnchorMan 对比 Watchman 2.5:左心耳封堵的随机比较(述评)
items.summary_zh: Garot 与 Nielsen-Kudsk 针对 SAFE-PROTECT 试验的配套述评,点评新型 AnchorMan 封堵器的设计特点与非劣效结果,并讨论器械周围残余漏差异的临床意义及对 LAA 封堵器械迭代格局的影响。
items.summary_en: Garot and Nielsen-Kudsk's editorial on SAFE-PROTECT reviews the new AnchorMan occluder's design and non-inferiority result and discusses what the peridevice-leak difference means for the evolving LAA-closure device landscape.

items.title: Comparing transcatheter aortic valves: time to look beyond simplistic categorisations
items.title_zh: 比较经导管主动脉瓣:是时候超越简单化分类了(述评)
items.summary_zh: Blackman 与 Maznyczka 针对 PORTICO IDE 血流动力学分析的配套述评,主张摒弃'自膨胀 vs 球扩'、'环上 vs 环内'的粗放二分法,转向基于具体瓣膜设计特征和患者解剖(尤其小瓣环)的个体化选瓣思路。
items.summary_en: Blackman and Maznyczka's editorial on the PORTICO IDE analysis argues for dropping the crude 'self-expanding vs balloon' and 'supra- vs intra-annular' labels in favor of valve-design- and anatomy-specific (especially small-annulus) prosthesis choice.

items.title: Concomitant transfemoral aortic and mitral valve replacement
items.title_zh: 经股动脉/静脉同期主动脉瓣与二尖瓣置换
items.summary_zh: 伦敦 St Thomas' 医院团队报告的同期全经导管主动脉瓣+二尖瓣置换病例,展示多瓣膜病变一站式经导管治疗的技术可行性与影像规划要点。为外科高危的联合瓣膜病患者提供全介入治疗路径的参考。
items.summary_en: A St Thomas' (London) case of concurrent fully transcatheter aortic and mitral valve replacement, demonstrating one-stop transcatheter therapy for multivalve disease and its imaging-planning considerations.
